reference_machine: Apple M5 Pro MacBook Pro, 18 cores, 48 GB RAM
refreeze_reason: The July 23 refreeze binds the corrected 25-case SEC corpus and the ornith:9b pipeline after adding decision-specific retrieval facets, fail-closed temporal and relationship guards, concise source-bound exposure projections, and question-bound review actions. The three-source HealthNet pilot measured 35.17 seconds for Brief and 14.034 seconds for an evidence-backed answerable Ask immediately before the final deterministic-only appendix, uncertainty-cap, and wording projections, which add no model calls. The 45-second regression budget remains unchanged; the canonical 50-operation run must measure this exact final pipeline and the ten-minute first-value contract remains unchanged.
invalidation_rule: Re-measure and re-freeze when the model, prompt scheme, retrieval pipeline, corpus, or reference machine changes.
